words.exampleMeaning: He was tired, however he continued working.

words.example: Погода была плохая. Тем не менее мы пошли гулять.
words.exampleMeaning: The weather was bad. Nevertheless, we went for a walk.

words.example: Он умный, к тому же очень трудолюбивый.
words.exampleMeaning: He is smart, and moreover very hardworking.

words.example: Шёл дождь, поэтому мы остались дома.
words.exampleMeaning: It was raining, so we stayed home.

words.example: Он знает английский. Кроме того, он учит французский.
words.exampleMeaning: He knows English. Besides, he is learning French.

words.example: С одной стороны, это хорошая идея.
words.exampleMeaning: On one hand, it's a good idea.

words.example: С другой стороны, это потребует много времени.
words.exampleMeaning: On the other hand, it will require a lot of time.

words.example: Он вегетарианец, то есть не ест мясо.
words.exampleMeaning: He is a vegetarian, that is, he doesn't eat meat.

words.example: Есть много способов, например, можно пойти пешком.
words.exampleMeaning: There are many ways, for example, you can walk.

words.example: На самом деле, это не так сложно.
words.exampleMeaning: In fact, it's not that difficult.
In my opinion, this is the best option.
Unfortunately, the store is already closed.

items.question: How do you say 'in my opinion' in Russian?
